why: Best first target for this machine class: large context, strong agent/instruction benchmarks, OpenAI-compatible serving guidance, and lower resource pressure than 7B/9B-class models.
Fastest lightweight fallback with explicit function-calling support and strong fit for compute-constrained or latency-bound scenarios.
Viable compact alternative with strong general quality and low footprint, but less attractive than Qwen for OpenAI-compatible and agent-style workflows.
Heavier fallback for stronger answer quality if the 4B-class candidates prove too weak on prompt/rewrite tasks.
